screen.helikon.title: Helikon
screen.helikon.no_selection: Select a module to edit its settings
screen.helikon.theme_editor.title: ClickGUI Theme
screen.helikon.theme_editor.instructions: Choose a local palette. Escape returns to the ClickGUI.
screen.helikon.hud_editor.title: Helikon HUD Editor
screen.helikon.hud_editor.instructions: Drag any movable preview. Better Crosshair stays centered. Escape returns to the ClickGUI.
screen.helikon.hud_settings.title: Helikon HUD Settings
screen.helikon.hud_settings.instructions: Click a row to change it. Escape returns to the HUD editor.
